description_long: This is a modern white SUV with a robust and boxy design, featuring four doors and a rear hatch. The vehicle has a high ground clearance, suitable for both urban and off-road environments, and is equipped with a roof rack for additional cargo capacity. The windows are tinted, and the side mirrors are prominent, providing good visibility for the driver. The wheels are large and appear to have a multi-spoke alloy design, though details are somewhat obscured. The SUV is parked on a patch of mixed dirt and asphalt, suggesting it is ready for versatile use. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with no visible damage or excessive wear.
description: A white, four-door SUV with a roof rack, tinted windows, and large alloy wheels, parked on a dirt and asphalt surface.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the back and left side, including the rear hatch and taillights.
description_view_1: Front three-quarter view highlighting the grille, headlights, and left side profile.
description_view_2: Front view focusing on the grille, headlights, and front bumper details.
description_view_3: Rear side view emphasizing the right side and rear hatch, with the roof rack visible.
